meridian.title: White-glove charter
meridian.desc: A Directorate under-secretary needs quiet, comfortable passage to {dest}. Stateroom mandatory, discretion doubly so — you will not remember this fare.

meridian.title: Bonded Union freight (pre-cleared)
meridian.desc: Sealed and stamped by Meridian customs before you touch it. {units} units to {dest}. The paperwork is immaculate; that's the point.

foundry.title: Heavy tow: mill casting
foundry.desc: One oversized casting, {units} units of it, bound for {dest}. Needs an empty hold and a captain who won't whine about trim.

foundry.title: Parts consignment
foundry.desc: Yard-fresh drive components for the fitters at {dest}. Handle like they're worth more than your ship, because to somebody they are.

solace.title: Repossession haul
solace.desc: Recovered collateral — somebody's ship, stripped to {units} units of it — back to the lienholder on {dest}. Don't read the registry plates.

kestrel.title: Harvest bulk: grain
kestrel.desc: The co-op needs {units} units of grain on {dest} before the price window closes on day {deadline}. Cheap by the unit, but the hold fills fast and the frontier remembers who hauled.

havens.title: Fence delivery — 'salvage'
havens.desc: Goods with a provenance the Folly would rather not discuss, bound for a buyer on {dest}. {units} units, hidden hold, and if a patrol opens it you were never here.

verge.title: Deep-supply run
verge.desc: Provisions for an outpost past the good charts, staged through {dest}. {units} units. Out here there are no ports to top up at — load right or don't come back.

dustwell.title: Water convoy consignment
dustwell.desc: Sealed water for the dry holdings out past {dest} — {units} units, wanted by day {deadline} before the cisterns run dry. On Dustwell, water is the only cargo nobody haggles over.
